'''Kiatha''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] who was active during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was [[Bounty/Legends|wanted]] by [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Police]] for mishandling a [[Ronto/Legends|Ronto]], resulting in extensive property damage. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the bounty was claimed by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]-turned [[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Behind the scenes==
Kiatha's bounty is worth 1,000 credits alive and 500 credits dead.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
